user_query: I'm a game developer and I'm looking for insights into the blockchain gaming market. Can you provide me with the market cap, trading volume, and the top game's market cap dominance? Additionally, give me a random pictionary word and a random charades word to spark some creativity.

TaskList.description: Fetch the market cap of the blockchain gaming market.
Retrieve the trading volume for the blockchain gaming assets.
Get the market cap dominance of the top blockchain gaming title.
Generate a random word for Pictionary.
Generate a random word for Charades.
